trustBrief.userJob: Understand how Sanchika lets people and coding agents create serious, emotionally coherent interface work without losing source, uncertainty, or human accountability.
trustBrief.primaryDecision: Choose an identity direction that makes Sanchika feel like a living, reusable design language rather than a generic component catalogue.
trustBoundaries: Sanchika supplies contracts and a development-time craft loop, not compliance judgment, customer evidence, or an application runtime.
Any source, interpretation, and human decision shown in product proof stays synthetic, explicit, and visibly distinct.
evidenceRequirements: Source, uncertainty, review state, and accountable human decision remain separate in any real proof surface.
Identity geometry is labelled as identity and never presented as provenance, product evidence, or authority.

claims.evidence: Repository-owned shape renders, a fresh plain-language control, and later calibrated isolated review.

nonGoals: No AI runtime, automated compliance judgment, customer proof, authority signal, fake dashboard, generic component grid, or raster dependency.

trustBrief.userJob: Understand how Sanchika lets people and coding agents create serious, emotionally coherent interface work without losing source, uncertainty, or human accountability.
trustBrief.primaryDecision: Choose an identity direction that makes Sanchika feel like a living, reusable design language rather than a generic component catalogue.
trustBoundaries: Sanchika supplies contracts and a development-time craft loop, not compliance judgment, customer evidence, or an application runtime.
Any source, interpretation, and human decision shown in product proof stays synthetic, explicit, and visibly distinct.
evidenceRequirements: Source, uncertainty, review state, and accountable human decision remain separate in any real proof surface.

claims.evidence: Repository-owned shape renders, a fresh plain-language control, and later calibrated isolated review.

nonGoals: No AI runtime, automated compliance judgment, customer proof, authority signal, fake dashboard, generic component grid, or raster dependency.

designBrief.firstViewportSignal: Sanchika is a living collection of interface grammar that helps humans and coding agents make serious work feel coherent and recognisably crafted.
designBrief.emotionalIntent: Memorable, alive, and genuinely made with care while remaining calm, trustworthy, and accountable under pressure.
narrativeArc: Gather distinct intent without flattening it
Reveal the shared grammar that makes a system reproducible
Hold a visible Witness Joint for source, interpretation, and human accountability
Show one real contract proof after the identity establishes its point of view
informationPriority: What becomes repeatable for people and coding agents
Source, uncertainty, and accountable human review
responsiveConstraints: Mobile keeps the wordmark, premise, collection verbs, and Witness Joint in a single reading order without relying on color or motion.
Desktop gives the identity enough compositional scale to feel authored while preserving a real HTML proof area and visible boundary.
verificationEvidence: Calibrated isolated visual review before the owner gate
nonGoals: No dashboard shell, fake authority, generic AI SaaS language, generic S monogram, fake product evidence, decorative motion, or motion-gated content.

disqualificationReasons: Calibrated review does not prefer this direction to both controls and retains a craft veto for the lime-ring composition; it cannot qualify by assertion.
Calibrated review and both recognition proxies identify this as the leading direction, but behavioural keyboard, forced-colors, and reduced-motion checks remain before it can qualify.
Calibrated review does not prefer this direction to the baseline and retains a craft veto for its opening proof staging; it cannot qualify by assertion.
Awaiting fresh calibrated review and recognition evidence for the Anek-controlled rebrief.
Awaiting fresh calibrated review and recognition evidence for the Anek-controlled rebrief.

findings: AI proxy evidence only, not human validation.

Witness Joint is the only direction preferred to both controls: its visible interval gives source, interpretation, and accountable decision a memorable, ownable form without impersonating provenance or authority.
Living Collection has energy but its lime ring competes with meaning-bearing copy; Craft Language remains less singular than the honest without-skill control.
AI proxy evidence only, not human validation.

Witness Joint resolves its prior overlap: source, interpretation, accountable decision, and caption now occupy distinct visual intervals, while the labelled synthetic contract enters the first desktop composition.
Living Collection's retained desktop composition still lets its lime arc overpower meaning-bearing text; Craft Language remains a familiar display-poster treatment.

vetoes.reason: The retained desktop composition still lets the lime arc overpower meaning-bearing text.
The rendered contract is not staged within the opening visual evidence.
The rendered contract is not staged within the opening visual evidence.

findings: AI visual-proxy evidence only; this is not user validation or human testing.

All directions preserve an honest non-runtime boundary: the proof is labelled synthetic, the footer says Sanchika is a design contract rather than compliance judgment, and no false authority or automated-decision claim was found.
Witness Joint best makes the accountable human explicit; the current baseline remains stronger on first-view boundary clarity, and behavioural accessibility modes remain unverified.
AI proxy evidence only, not human validation.
The target-size veto is resolved: a rebuilt 390px browser matrix reports every native anchor and summary at least 44px, with no under-threshold targets across all three routes.
All directions share one readable DOM order, worded states, native disclosures, and no horizontal overflow at 390px; behavioural keyboard, forced-colors, and reduced-motion checks remain open.
Calibration passed for generic-AI-SaaS, off-brief editorial, and fake-authority controls.
Witness Joint best expresses an ownable open interval and explicit human boundary; its crop annotation remains dense.
Living Collection has recognisable energy, but the competing colour field needs tighter dominance control.
Craft Language is legible but less ownable than the other R2 directions.
AI visual-proxy evidence only; this is not user validation or owner selection.
Anek gives all boards a coherent humanist display voice without serif theatre or generic AI-SaaS styling.
Witness Joint is the strongest identity-family candidate: the ruled interval makes source, interpretation, and accountable decision memorable while hierarchy holds at desktop and mobile.
Living Collection needs tighter dominance rules around its proof-card field.
Craft Language is legible and safe, but its internal markers read as secondary decoration.
AI visual-proxy evidence only; this is not user validation or an owner-selection decision.
Relevant generic-AI-SaaS, fake-authority, and mobile-accessibility calibration controls were detected; off-brief editorial controls are not trust-role calibration.
No R2 board makes a government, ministry, certification, statutory-accuracy, performance, or automated-compliance claim.
Witness Joint best keeps source and interpretation distinct with an accountable human decision-maker; production copy should retain the baseline's explicit no-runtime boundary.
The specimen labels synthetic records and the direction structures are identity constructs, not authority or product evidence.
AI visual-proxy evidence only; this is not user validation.
Calibration control exposes low contrast, undersized controls, motion-only signal, color-only state, and long-identifier overflow.
Retained browser evidence establishes loaded local Anek, one main landmark, proof heading, no overflow, and at least 44px target blocks at 1440px and 390px.
Witness Joint has the clearest desktop-to-mobile reading path and explicit human-decision boundary.
A direct headless-Chrome Tab run reached all 12 actionable controls in sequence, with visible focus indicators and no hidden focus target or trap.
Direct forced-colors and reduced-motion emulation passed for all three routes; this is browser-verified laboratory evidence, not human validation.

assets.licence: SIL Open Font License 1.1; source pinned to google/fonts ac1371ad5eccb06352daf399448b673a79c98024/ofl/anekdevanagari; Latin subset selected because the lab displays no Devanagari.

renderEvidence.finding: The desktop shape record establishes the collection verbs and an explicitly labelled Witness Joint before direction exploration.
The 390px shape record preserves a single reading order and does not rely on motion or colour alone.
Accessibility constraints are explicit at shape and must be verified again against interactive direction code.
Clean 390px browser capture of Direction A after the proof-stage revision and narrow-width ring removal.
Clean 1440px browser capture of Direction A after the proof-stage revision.
Clean 390px browser capture of Direction B with the Witness Joint retained in the mobile reading order.
Clean 1440px browser capture of Direction B with the proof in the same identity frame.
Clean 390px browser capture of Direction C after the in-stage proof and light-surface foreground repair.
Clean 1440px browser capture of Direction C after the proof-stage revision.
Measured 390px width, no horizontal overflow, a 44px minimum actionable proof target, and the in-stage proof heading across all routes; keyboard focus and behavioural accessibility modes remain open.
Three independent AI matchers recognised both semantic-blind and identity-blind Witness Joint boards from geometry and composition, not colour; this is not human validation.
Round-two paired 1440px and 390px code-native capture with the self-hosted Anek Latin variable specimen.
Round-two paired 1440px and 390px code-native capture with the self-hosted Anek Latin variable specimen.
Round-two paired 1440px and 390px code-native capture with the self-hosted Anek Latin variable specimen.
Official source, SIL OFL 1.1, local payload, variable axes, Latin script coverage, and browser-loaded local font evidence.
Round-two browser evidence records the loaded local font, desktop/mobile landmark, overflow, and target-size observations, plus the remaining keyboard and preference-emulation limits.
A direct Chrome run verified the full 12-control keyboard sequence plus reduced-motion and forced-colors behavior for all three 390px R2 routes.

adoptionEvidence.verificationRun: SANCHIKA_CRAFT_LAB=true node_modules/.bin/astro build emitted 64 pages, including all three craft-lab routes. The local pnpm launcher did not yield a usable run, which is recorded as an environment gap. A locally served static artifact confirmed the self-hosted font request and the retained desktop/mobile browser observations.
adoptionEvidence.rollbackPlan: Delete the isolated lab and restore the recorded source commit before any production adoption.

residualRisks: Round-one direction renders and AI proxy reviews are preserved as historical audit evidence only; they cannot qualify a direction because the required self-hosted Anek specimen was absent.

R2 browser checks are controlled 390px laboratory evidence only; they do not replace manual assistive-technology testing, user validation, production performance measurements, or the separate owner decision.
Direction approval authorizes only the isolated production-build phase. Production approval, consumer adoption, and S11 remain separate owner and verification gates.
nextActions: Implement the approved identity family in the gallery production surface while retaining all source, uncertainty, and human-accountability boundaries.
Anek Devanagari is owner-frozen for the gallery identity layer; do not add another typeface comparison or production font asset.
Complete C2R-B, the required browser/performance matrix, repository verification, and the distinct production owner gate.

nextAction: Reconcile the production implementation, retained evidence, and rollback path before the distinct owner production decision.
